query:
CREATE TABLE transition_training_requirements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  courseId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  courseName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  courseDescription TEXT,
  durationHours DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  passingScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 80.00,
  sequenceOrder INT NOT NULL,
  isRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  category ENUM('tax_compliance', 'business_operations', 'legal', 'platform', 'financial') NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_course (courseId)
)

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  courseId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  courseName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  courseDescription TEXT,
  durationHours DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  passingScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 80.00,
  sequenceOrder INT NOT NULL,
  isRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  category ENUM('tax_compliance', 'business_operations', 'legal', 'platform', 'financial') NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_course (courseId)
)
